fulcio_oidc.note: Wave 2 verifier MUST invoke `cosign verify-blob` with --certificate-oidc-issuer=<oidc_issuer> and --certificate-identity-regexp=<identity_regex>. The keyval.public is the Sigstore Fulcio v1 intermediate CA, pinned for transparency.

offline_ceremony.note: Detached Ed25519 signature over the same artifact bytes as the Fulcio axis. Private key held ONLY as the WAVE2_OFFLINE_KEY_B64 GitHub Actions secret (base64 PKCS#8 PEM); never in the repo, not even encrypted. Local backup in the maintainer's password manager. Keys rotated 2026-07-03.

wave2_design.purpose: close the xz-utils single-maintainer single-signing-axis gap
wave2_design.summary: two-axis 2-of-2 signing — Fulcio OIDC AND offline Ed25519
wave2_design.verifier_contract: Wave 2 install-verify script reads this root.json, then for each released artifact requires: (1) a Sigstore signature verifiable by cosign against the fulcio_oidc identity_regex, AND (2) a detached Ed25519 signature verifiable against the offline_ceremony public key. Either signature missing or failing aborts the install.
